summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Racing San Gabriel ADC sports club website. All major functionality working correctly including backend APIs, frontend UI, authentication, admin panel, and integrations.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (100% success rate - 43/43 tests passed)
All public endpoints (news, teams, matches, gallery, settings) return correct data
Authentication system (login, logout, token validation, wrong credentials handling)
All protected CRUD endpoints (create, read, update, delete for news, teams, matches, gallery)
Contact form submission (both backend API and frontend form)
Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, News, Teams, Calendar, Gallery, Contact, Footer)
Navigation links work and scroll to correct sections
Social media links (Instagram, Facebook) present in header and footer with correct URLs
Login page renders correctly with proper error handling
Admin panel dashboard shows correct statistics and recent messages
Admin CRUD operations (create news, view teams, delete contact messages)
Admin logout functionality and session protection
Authorization system properly rejects unauthorized requests
